subject: [RFC PATCH 33/40] PM: hibernate: walk per-superpageblock free lists in mark_free_pages

reviews.author: Rafael J. Wysocki
reviews.summary: Suggested breaking down the code into a separate function to simplify the logic and improve readability. Proposed an alternative implementation using if-else statements instead of a loop.

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch series proposes changes to the hibernation code in the Linux kernel, specifically to improve its handling of free pages after the introduction of superpage blocks (SPBs). The current implementation walks the buddy allocator's free lists and marks each page as free, but this approach is inefficient with SPBs. The proposed change wraps the existing per-page walk in an SPB iteration loop, ensuring that free pages are correctly marked as such.
